eligibility.label: Corporation must have minimum equity of $500,000 CAD
eligibility.disqualifyMessage: Corporation equity is below the $500,000 minimum required for strategic projects

eligibility.label: Minimum 3 jobs must be created per key staff member
eligibility.disqualifyMessage: Must create at least 3 jobs per key staff member

eligibility.label: Must be an established international corporation with senior management experience
eligibility.disqualifyMessage: Must have at least 3 years of senior management experience with an established international corporation
